subcodes.first_line: O my God, my God! These servants of Thine are indeed sweet-scented flowers in the meadows of Thy love and towering trees in the gardens [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الهی الهی ان عبادک هولاء ریاحین معطره فی ریاض محبتک و اشجار باسقه فی غیاض
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for the spiritual progress of others, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities
